title: Holy-Demonic PvP Pack
description:
its a simple and bright pvp pack
Holy-Demonic PvP Pack Provides Holy and Demonic knight looks.
version from 1.16 to latest
body:
This time I present you "Holy-Demonic PvP Pack ".
its is a simple and bright themed PvP texture pack
its change texture of the armors and weapons
this pack make your PvP fight better and beautiful.
and by new texture you can enjoy the Minecraft in a new way.
Holy-Demonic PvP Pack Provides Holy and Demonic knight looks.

Optifine required for glowing textures.
materials are:-

1)Golden Armor Set
2)Diamoand Armor Set
3)Netherite Armor Set
4)Iron Armor Set
5)Totem
6)Bow
7)Arrow
8)Crossbow
9)End crystal
10)Golden Apple
11)Golden Tools
12)Diamond Tools
13)Netherite Tools
14)Iron Tools
15)Golden Sword
16)Diamond Sword
17)Netherite Sword
18)Iron Sword
19)Elytra
20)Shield
21)Trident
22)all kind of arrows


This pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers.


version supported
form- 1.16 TO Latest version

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files


Enjoy the "Holy-Demonic PvP Pack".


THANKS FOR DOWNLOADING.
